description: Composition Black sleeveless top made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has a v-neck with sequins, raglan armholes, elasticated sides creating a ruched effect and branding in stone embellishments on the left hem Fit Blouse fit Wash care Machine wash with like colours using warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron, do not iron on decorations Year end is all about vacations and parties. Gear up and slip into the festive mood in style with this sequined top from arrow. The viscose cotton/lycra blend and the elasticated, ruched sides are sure to flatter your silhouette, while you look ravishing in this top paired with jeans, stiletto sandals and long earrings. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
